project.address: 1659 BEE CANYON RD, ARROYO GRANDE, CA 93420, USA

scopeOfWork: TO INSTALL A TESLA BATTERY PACK SYSTEM AT THE OWNER RESIDENCE LOCATED AT 1659 BEE CANYON RD, ARROYO GRANDE, CA 93420, USA. THE POWER GENERATED BY THE PV SYSTEM WILL BE INTERCONNECTED WITH THE UTILITY GRID THROUGH THE EXISTING ELECTRICAL SERVICE EQUIPMENT. THE SYSTEM INCLUDE STORAGE BATTERIES WITH BACKUP SWITCH.
batteryWarning: BATTERIES MUST BE INSTALLED 3 FT FROM ANY WINDOW OR DOOR.
generalNotes: THESE NOTES SET MINIMUM STANDARDS FOR CONSTRUCTION. THE DRAWINGS GOVERN OVER THESE NOTES TO THE EXTENT SHOWN. ALL WORK SHALL CONFIRM TO THE MINIMUM STANDARDS OF THE FOLLOWING: LOCAL BUILDING CODE, LOCAL ELECTRICAL CODE, ANY PORTION OF THE WORK AND THOSE CODES AND STANDARDS LISTED IN THESE DRAWINGS AND IN THE SUBCONTRACTOR AGREEMENT. REFER TO REFERENCE DOCUMENTS LIST.
COORDINATE THESE DRAWINGS WITH SPECIFICATIONS AND MANUFACTURER'S INSTALLATION AND OPERATION MANUALS AND NOTIFY CONTRACTOR OF ANY DISCREPANCIES PRIOR TO BEGINNING WORK.

PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF ANY WORK, EACH TRADE SHALL VERIFY EXISTING CONDITIONS AND NOTIFY CONTRACTOR OF ANY DISCREPANCIES TO THAT WHICH IS SHOWN IN THESE DRAWINGS, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DIMENSIONS OF THE WORK AREA, STRUCTURE, EXISTING ELECTRICAL SERVICE, CONDUIT PATHS, OBSTRUCTIONS, ACCESSIBILITY ISSUES, AND WORKING CLEARANCES. UNLESS INDICATED AS EXISTING (E), ALL PROPOSED MATERIALS AND EQUIPMENT ARE NEW.
MAINTAIN CONTINUITY OF ALL EXISTING CIRCUITS OR PORTIONS THEREOF AFFECTED BY NEW WORK.
ALL ITEMS TO BE REMOVED AND RELOCATED OR REPLACED SHALL BE HANDLED WITH PROPER CARE AND STORED IN A SAFE PLACE TO PREVENT DAMAGE; OR BE REPLACED AT THE SUBCONTRACTOR'S EXPENSE.
ALL EQUIPMENT SHALL BE MOUNTED AS SHOWN. WHERE DETAILS ARE NOT PROVIDED, THE SUBCONTRACTOR SHALL USE DILIGENT EFFORTS TO MOUNT EQUIPMENT SUCH THAT IT WILL BE CLEAN, LEVEL, AND SOLID.
ALL SURFACES SHALL BE PATCHED AND PAINTED AROUND NEW DEVICES AND EQUIPMENT TO MATCH EXISTING FINISHES.

ANY METAL SHAVINGS RESULTING FROM SITE WORK SHALL BE CLEANED FROM ROOF SURFACES, ENCLOSURES, AND ANY ADDITIONAL AREAS WHERE OXIDIZED OR CONDUCTIVE METAL SHAVINGS MAY CAUSE RUST, ELECTRICAL SHORT CIRCUITS, OR OTHER DAMAGE.
BEAMS OR JOISTS SHALL NOT BE DRILLED UNLESS SPECIFICALLY AUTHORIZED BY CONTRACTOR.
WHEN MOUNTING EQUIPMENT TO EXISTING REINFORCED CONCRETE, USE CARE TO A VOID CUTTING OR DAMAGING THE REINFORCING BARS. POWER DRIVEN PINS ARE NOT TO BE USED.
IF THE OCCUPANCY STRUCTURE IS RESIDENTIAL, IT WILL BE UPGRADED TO CONFIRM WITH 2025 CALIFORNIA RESIDENTIAL CODE REQUIREMENTS FOR CARBON MONOXIDE ALARMS (SECTION R315), AND SMOKE DETECTORS.
CONTRACTOR SHALL FURNISH ALL SUPERVISION, TEMPORARY FACILITIES, AND OTHER NECESSARY ITEMS AS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THE WORK SPECIFIED TO PROVIDE A COMPLETE AND USABLE SYSTEM.

DRAWINGS ARE DIAGRAMMATIC. SITE CONDITIONS SHALL PREVAIL. IF NO SCALE IS GIVEN, DRAWINGS ARE NOT TO SCALE. ALL DIMENSIONS SHALL BE VERIFIED BY SUBCONTRACTOR AND SUBCONTRACTORS IN THE FIELD UPON COMMENCEMENT OF CONSTRUCTION.

SUBCONTRACTOR SHALL CHECK AND VERIFY ALL DIMENSIONS AND CONDITIONS AT JOB SITE AND REPORT ANY DISCREPANCIES TO CONTRACTOR'S SUPERINTENDENT, PROJECT MANAGER OR CONSTRUCTION MANAGER BEFORE COMMENCING WORK.
ALL CONDUCTOR SIZES AND TYPES SPECIFIED IN SINGLE LINE AND /OR THREE LINE DIAGRAMS ARE TO BE INSTALLED.
batteryStorageNotes: BACKFEED BREAKERS MUST BE LOCATED@OPPOSITE END OF BUS BAR FROM MAIN BREAKER OR MAIN LUG ON GRID SIDE. WHEN A BACKFED BREAKER IS THE METHOD OF UTILITY INTERCONNECTION, BREAKER SHALL NOT READ 'LINE OR LOAD'. PER CEC 250.64(C): CONDUCTOR SPLICES ONLY ALLOWED WITH COMPRESSION CONNECTORS OR EXOTHERMIC WELDING VERIFY (E) UFER GROUND NEAR MSP. IF (E) UFER IS NOT ACCESSIBLE OR VERIFIABLE, INSTALL A NEW 5/8"0 X 8' LONG GROUNDING ROD AND BOND SOLAR SYSTEM EQUIPMENT GROUNDING ACCORDINGLY.

WHEN ESS IS INSTALLED INSIDE GARAGE - ANY PLANNED OR EXISTING ATTACHED GARAGE SHALL COMPLY WITH ALL APPLICABLE CODES AND STANDARDS, AND WITH THE MANUFACTURERS INSTALLATION MANUALS TO WHICH EQUIPMENT HAS BEEN LISTED. INCLUDING REQUIREMENTS PERTAINING TO FIRE PROTECTIVE FEATURES ( E.G. GYPSUM BOARD, DOORS, AND DUCTS) AND TO ALARM/DETECTOR DEVICES.

title: EXTERIOR HOUSE WALL,
SOUTH-EAST SIDE (UNDER DECK)
notes: NOTE: BATTERIES MUST BE INSTALLED 3 FT AWAY FROM DOORS AND WINDOWS ONLY WHEN INSTALLED OUTDOORS.

NOTE: EQUIPMENT LAYOUT IS ILLUSTRATIVE AND FOR REFERENCE ONLY. FINAL PLACEMENT SHALL COMPLY WITH LOCAL CODE REQUIREMENTS, MANUFACTURER SPECIFICATIONS, FIELD CONDITIONS, AND AUTHORITY HAVING JURISDICTION (AHJ) APPROVAL

NOTE:
* PROVIDE AND MAINTAIN 36" DEPTH, 30" WIDTH, AND 6'6" HEADROOM IN FRONT OF ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT PER CEC 110.26

* METER CENTERLINE ELEVATION TO COMPLY WITH UTILITY-SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS. TYPICAL ALLOWABLE RANGE: 48"-75" ABOVE FINISHED GRADE WITH 60" PREFERRED. CONFIRM FINAL PLACEMENT WITH SERVING UTILITY.
